title: Cut to the Chase
description: Cut blocks down to their raw ingredients, in a balanced way
body:
Convert blocks to their raw materials!
- Dripstone Block -> Pointed Dripstone
- Honeycomb Block -> Honeycomb
- Purpur Block -> Popped Chorus Fruit
- Bricks -> Brick
- Nether Bricks -> Nether Brick
- Glowstone -> Glowstone Dust
- Clay -> Clay Ball
- Prismarine -> Prismarine Shard
- Prismarine Bricks -> Prismarine Shard
- Snow Block -> Snowball
- Block of Quartz -> Nether Quartz
- Wool -> String
